title: Encounter
subtitle: A tool for intimacy, respect, and self-understanding
letterTitle: To everyone who lives and loves with intention
letterParagraph1: When you open this page, perhaps you just want to capture a moment in an intimate relationship. Perhaps it's a moment of closeness, perhaps a mood, perhaps just a night you don't want to forget.
letterParagraph2: But I hope this is more than just a recording tool. It can be a quiet place where you slowly come to understand your body, your feelings, and your relationships — while still remembering respect, communication, and boundaries in intimacy.
letterParagraph3: Intimacy shouldn't be simply judged, nor does it need to be compared. It's not just numbers, frequency, or outcomes — it's the genuine moments of closeness between two people, the feeling of being heard, understood, and treated well.
letterParagraph4: So, I hope what this product brings you isn't anxiety, but a calmer way of recording. Your data belongs to you, and your feelings don't need to be proven to anyone. You can face yourself honestly, and look back gently at how a relationship has changed.
letterParagraph5: May every record you make bring you closer to your true self; and may you have a relationship that is respected, understood, and taken seriously.

dataBelongsToYou.title: Data Isolation
dataBelongsToYou.description: RLS ensures only you can access your records

noJudgment.title: No Judgment
noJudgment.description: No 'normal' or 'abnormal' — only your authentic feelings

noAnxiety.description: No leaderboards, no comparisons, no social pressure

deleteAnytime.title: Delete Anytime
deleteAnytime.description: One-click CSV export or permanent deletion — come and go freely

dataEncrypted.title: Encrypted Storage
dataEncrypted.description: AES-256 encryption at rest, HTTPS protecting all transit

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Fully open source on GitHub — anyone can audit
